name: Kart Rush - 3D Racing Game
description: Welcome to Kart Rush! Let's take a great kart ride and totally fulfill your vision of racing. There are so many obstacles that you have to be patient and avoid any crashes, and even a few props can be used to speed up your ride. Opportunity and risk exist! Be careful and do not flip your car by seeking to safely change your location. Get the highest score as far as you can!
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Fun, H5, HTML5, Hypercasual, Kart, Kid, Kids, Race, Racing
